Folded all OQ decisions into design-spec.md: §4.3 tiered gate + reason-routed rejection + review queue; §4.2/§4.6 many-to-one provenance + supersede/append + soft-invalidate + citation; §4.4 three kill switches; §4.7 regen-both/ignore-both; §4.15 v1-simple + v2 three-tier target; §5 four surfaces + event-bus hook; §7/§8 updated; glossary.
All 7 open questions researched, decided with Nathan, and folded into design-spec.md.
Added §4.17 Priming/hot-core; updated §5 (prime-at-startup + recall-per-query), glossary (hot core, priming), §8 residual (size budget + cold-start seeding).
Wrote technical-spec.md skeleton: purpose/scope/non-goals, design->technical cross-ref map, and section stubs for all downstream tasks.
Wrote §7.1: actor table (9 actors, kind/interface/trust) + full CUJ catalog (24 journeys, CUJ-A/P/H/O IDs) with the per-journey template. Backbone for TS6a-d.

Wrote §5: entity ER diagram, full table schemas (raw_dumps, concepts+core/tags/tsv/embedding, concept_ledger, concept_provenance, edit_proposals, judge_verdicts, review_queue, RBAC, import staging, procrastinate), ledger trigger design (GUC actor, same-txn), hybrid retrieval indexes (GIN FTS + HNSW + tags), alembic migrations + v2 retention seam note.

Wrote §6: conventions (versioning/auth/error envelope/limits/idempotency), machine write (POST /v1/memories -> 202, one-txn insert+enqueue), reads (prime, recall+RRF, concepts, history), MCP recall (no first-class save), admin console htmx routes mapped to CUJs, import/export endpoints, health/ready.

Wrote all 24 CUJs across §7.2-7.5 (agent hot path A1-A5, autonomous pipeline P1-P7, human console H1-H6, admin ops O1-O6), each with actor/trigger/preconditions/tier-steps/outcome/failure/design-ref, written to double as integration-test scripts.

Wrote §2 topology recap (mermaid) + §3 architecture: 4-tier Controller/Service/Repository/Model per litestar-fullstack + advanced-alchemy (real primitives), schema-struct convention, DI via create_service_dependencies, autocommit persistence config, dual-extractor auth + RBAC guards + sanitization seam, procrastinate worker as separate process, domain-first module layout mapping every design-spec concept to a home.

Wrote §4 dev env: prerequisites (uv/py3.13/docker), compose backing services (pgvector, Keycloak dev realm, optional local-llm profile), env config + owner bootstrap, three dev model backends (local OpenAI-compatible Linux/macOS, claude -p, copilot -p) with dev-data-only hazard, Makefile targets, first-run walkthrough that doubles as smoke test.

Wrote §8: integration-first philosophy, three test tiers, real Postgres via pytest-databases (trigger/tsvector/HNSW exercised for real), deterministic agent testing via injected fake model provider + separate prompt-eval suite, golden tests, a per-CUJ coverage matrix of load-bearing invariants, CI wiring with fast fake-model gate.

Wrote §9: typed env-driven settings groups w/ sensible defaults; observability (reject-rate, review-queue depth, gateway spend, queue health, hot-path vs derivation latency, structlog+OTel); security (dual-extractor auth, hash-only keys, XSS seam + render-time allowlist, universal privacy screen, raw-dump access asymmetry + v2 crypto-shred hook, model-not-a-boundary); error handling (fail-fast, hot-path isolation, envelope, idempotency).

Wrote §10: pyproject rename + runtime dep list (litestar/advanced-alchemy/procrastinate/crewai/etc.), kept template ruff/mypy gates, pre-commit + migration-drift check, two entrypoints from one image + compose, CI matrix (lint/type, pytest+pytest-databases with fake model, migration drift, opt-in prompt-eval), container-image release replacing PyPI.
technical-spec.md complete: all 10 sections (scope, architecture, dev env, data model, API, 24 CUJs, testing, cross-cutting, build/CI) authored across TS0-TS9.
